channel.title: SPL - Fremont Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Fremont Branch

item.title: Teen Arts & Crafts: Nowruz (Spring Equinox) Card-Making
item.description:
Saturday, March 7, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Fremont Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for a drop-in art workshop for youth aged 12-17, exploring themes of identity, culture, and community.

Event details

item.title: Write at the Fremont Branch
item.description:
Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Fremont Branch

Join author Alma García for a free drop-in writing circle for all genres of writing.

Event details

item.title: Family Story Time
item.description:
Wednesday, March 11, 2026 at 10:15 AM

Location: Fremont Branch

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities. 

Event details
